en.title: Master of Computer Applications (MCA)
en.text: Completed my [[Master of Computer Applications]] with a strong focus on software development, database management, web technologies, and object-oriented programming. Enhanced my analytical and problem-solving skills through academic projects and practical application development.

en.title: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA)
en.text: Earned a [[Bachelor of Computer Applications]] degree, building a strong foundation in programming, computer fundamentals, database systems, and software engineering concepts. Participated in academic projects that strengthened practical development skills.

en.title: Higher Secondary Education (12th - Science)
en.institution: Maharshi Sandeepan V.P. Sr. Sec. School
en.text: Completed [[Higher Secondary Education]] with a Science stream, developing strong analytical thinking and problem-solving abilities that later supported my transition into computer applications and software development.

en.title: Secondary Education (10th)
en.institution: Saraswati Shishu Mandir Higher Secondary School
en.text: Successfully completed [[Secondary Education]], establishing a strong academic foundation in mathematics, science, and communication skills that contributed to my future studies in computer applications.
